name: Fresh Strawberries (1 lb)
description: Sun-ripened strawberries picked at peak sweetness. Plump, juicy, and intensely flavourful — perfect for eating fresh, topping cereals and yoghurt, baking into desserts, or blending into drinks.

specifications.value: Keep refrigerated; wash just before eating

additionalInfo.value: Fresh eating, shortcake, jam, smoothies, salads, dipping in chocolate

reviews.title: Like eating sunshine in berry form
reviews.reviewText: These are extraordinary. Sweet, juicy, and fragrant — nothing like the watery, flavourless strawberries you find in off-season supermarkets. Absolutely worth the price.

reviews.title: Made the best strawberry shortcake
reviews.reviewText: Used these for a birthday shortcake and got endless compliments. The berries were massive, perfectly ripe, and insanely sweet. My family is obsessed.

reviews.title: Delicious but fragile
reviews.reviewText: Flavour is outstanding — probably the best strawberries I've ever had. A few at the bottom were a little squished from shipping, but the rest were pristine. Would still order again.

reviews.title: Great for kids
reviews.reviewText: My 5 and 7-year-olds devoured an entire pound in one sitting, which tells you everything. Naturally sweet enough that they didn't even ask for sugar or chocolate.

reviews.title: Smoothie heaven
reviews.reviewText: I freeze half the pack for smoothies and eat the rest fresh. The flavour even holds up frozen, which is impressive. Consistent quality across three orders now.
